# Slovak WordNet

This folder contains the [**original** WordNet file](./wordnet_full.txt) by Dzurjuv, Genči, and Garabík, as well as a [**derived** version](./wordnet_pos_tags.csv). The WordNet is available under the [Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 License](./CREATIVE_COMMONS_ATTRIBUTION_SHAREALIKE_3.0_UNPORTED_LICENSE.txt), [GNU Affero General Public License](./GNU_AFFERO_GPL_LICENSE.md), and the [Open Database License](./OPEN_DATA_COMMONS_LICENSE.md). For further redistributions, all three licenses apply. The original file can also be found at [this site](https://korpus.juls.savba.sk/WordNet.html). The derived version is the WordNet converted into CSV format for easier parsing, with only 2 columns extracted: `pos`, `word`, where `pos` is the Part-Of-Speech tag for the given word. All other columns are removed. The date of modification is 31st of March, 2026.

Original WordNet citation: Ondrej Dzurjuv, Ján Genči and Radovan Garabík: Generating Sets of Synonyms between Languages. In: Natural Language Processing, Multilinguality. Proceedings of the 6th International Conference SLOVKO 2011. Eds. D. Majchráková, R. Garabík. November 2011, Tribun, Brno.
